en: "These are the names of the tribes: Beginning at the northern extreme, beside the way of Hethlon to Lebo-hamath, as far as Hazar-enan (which is on the northern border of Damascus over against Hamath), and extending from the east side to the west, Dan, one portion.
zh: “各支派名下的產業是這樣：在北邊盡頭的地界起，沿著希特倫的路，經哈馬口到大馬士革邊界上的哈薩．以難，北邊靠著哈馬地，從東到西，是但的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Dan, from the east side to the west, Asher, one portion.
zh: 沿著但的邊界，從東到西，是亞設的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Asher, from the east side to the west, Naphtali, one portion.
zh: 沿著亞設的邊界，從東到西，是拿弗他利的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Naphtali, from the east side to the west, Manasseh, one portion.
zh: 沿著拿弗他利的邊界，從東到西，是瑪拿西的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Manasseh, from the east side to the west, Ephraim, one portion.
zh: 沿著瑪拿西的邊界，從東到西，是以法蓮的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Ephraim, from the east side to the west, Reuben, one portion.
zh: 沿著以法蓮的邊界，從東到西，是流本的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Reuben, from the east side to the west, Judah, one portion.
zh: 沿著流本的邊界，從東到西，是猶大的一份。

en: "Adjoining the territory of Judah, from the east side to the west, shall be the portion which you shall set apart, 25,000 cubits in breadth, and in length equal to one of the tribal portions, from the east side to the west, with the sanctuary in the midst of it.
zh: “沿著猶大的邊界，從東到西，就是你們所要獻出的聖區，長十二公里半，從東到西的長度與其他各份的一樣，聖所要在其中。

en: The portion that you shall set apart for the LORD shall be 25,000 cubits in length, and 20,000 in breadth.
zh: 你們獻給耶和華的地區，要長十二公里半，寬十公里。

en: These shall be the allotments of the holy portion: the priests shall have an allotment measuring 25,000 cubits on the northern side, 10,000 cubits in breadth on the western side, 10,000 in breadth on the eastern side, and 25,000 in length on the southern side, with the sanctuary of the LORD in the midst of it.
zh: 獻給祭司的聖地，北邊長十二公里半，西邊寬五公里，東邊寬五公里，南邊長十二公里半。

en: This shall be for the consecrated priests, the sons of Zadok, who kept my charge, who did not go astray when the people of Israel went astray, as the Levites did.
zh: 這地要歸給祭司，就是撒督子孫中分別為聖的。他們守我所吩咐的職責；以色列人走迷路的時候，他們不像利未人那樣走迷路。

en: And it shall belong to them as a special portion from the holy portion of the land, a most holy place, adjoining the territory of the Levites.
zh: 因此，從所獻的聖區要有一塊地獻給祭司，作為至聖之地。這地沿著利未人的地界。

en: And alongside the territory of the priests, the Levites shall have an allotment 25,000 cubits in length and 10,000 in breadth. The whole length shall be 25,000 cubits and the breadth 20,000.
zh: 沿著祭司的地界要有一塊地獻給利未人，長十二公里半，寬五公里。祭司的地也是長十二公里半，寬五公里。

en: They shall not sell or exchange any of it. They shall not alienate this choice portion of the land, for it is holy to the LORD.
zh: 這地的任何部分不可變賣，不可交換，也不可轉讓給別人，因為它是這地中最好的一份，是歸耶和華為聖的。

en: "The remainder, 5,000 cubits in breadth and 25,000 in length, shall be for common use for the city, for dwellings and for open country. In the midst of it shall be the city,
zh: “所剩下的地，寬兩公里半，長十二公里半，要作俗地，供城市、居民和郊野之用。城要在其中。

en: and these shall be its measurements: the north side 4,500 cubits, the south side 4,500, the east side 4,500, and the west side 4,500.
zh: 城的大小是這樣：北邊二千二百五十公尺，南邊二千二百五十公尺，東 邊二千二百五十公尺，西邊二 千二百五十公尺。

en: And the city shall have open land: on the north 250 cubits, on the south 250, on the east 250, and on the west 250.
zh: 城要有郊野， 北邊一百二十五公尺，南邊一 百二十五公尺，東邊一百二十五公尺，西邊一百二十五公尺。

en: The remainder of the length alongside the holy portion shall be 10,000 cubits to the east, and 10,000 to the west, and it shall be alongside the holy portion. Its produce shall be food for the workers of the city.
zh: 這俗地兩旁剩下的地，沿著所獻的聖區的長度計算，東邊五公里，西邊五公里，也沿著所獻的聖區。這些地的出產要給城裡的工人作食物。

en: And the workers of the city, from all the tribes of Israel, shall till it.
zh: 城裡的工人來自以色列各支派，耕種這地。

en: The whole portion that you shall set apart shall be 25,000 cubits square, that is, the holy portion together with the property of the city.
zh: 所獻的整個地區，長十二公里半，寬十二公里半，是見方的。你們要把所獻的聖區，連同城的基業，一起獻上。

en: "What remains on both sides of the holy portion and of the property of the city shall belong to the prince. Extending from the 25,000 cubits of the holy portion to the east border, and westward from the 25,000 cubits to the west border, parallel to the tribal portions, it shall belong to the prince. The holy portion with the sanctuary of the temple shall be in its midst.
zh: “所獻的聖區和城的基業，兩旁所剩下的都要歸給君王，從那寬十二公里半的獻地以東至東面的邊界，以及從那寬十二公里半的獻地以西至西邊的邊界沿著其他各分地，都要歸給君王。這樣所獻的聖地和殿的聖所，都在這兩塊地的中間。

en: It shall be separate from the property of the Levites and the property of the city, which are in the midst of that which belongs to the prince. The portion of the prince shall lie between the territory of Judah and the territory of Benjamin.
zh: 利未人的基業和城的基業都位於君王的地中間。君王的地是在猶大的邊界和便雅憫的邊界中間。

en: "As for the rest of the tribes: from the east side to the west, Benjamin, one portion.
zh: “至於其餘的支派，從東到西，是便雅憫的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Benjamin, from the east side to the west, Simeon, one portion.
zh: 沿著便雅憫的邊界，從東到西，是西緬的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Simeon, from the east side to the west, Issachar, one portion.
zh: 沿著西緬的邊界，從東到西，是以薩迦的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Issachar, from the east side to the west, Zebulun, one portion.
zh: 沿著以薩迦的邊界，從東到西，是西布倫的一份。

en: Adjoining the territory of Zebulun, from the east side to the west, Gad, one portion.
zh: 沿著西布倫的邊界，從東到西，是迦得的一份。

en: And adjoining the territory of Gad to the south, the boundary shall run from Tamar to the waters of Meribah-kadesh, from there along the Brook of Egypt to the Great Sea.
zh: 迦得南面的邊界，是從他瑪到米利巴．加低斯水，經埃及小河到大海。

en: This is the land that you shall allot as an inheritance among the tribes of Israel, and these are their portions, declares the Lord GOD.
zh: 這就是你們要抽籤分給以色列各支派為業的地。這些分地就是他們所得的分。”這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: "These shall be the exits of the city: On the north side, which is to be 4,500 cubits by measure,
zh: “城北面的長度是二千二百五十公尺。城的出口是這樣：

en: three gates, the gate of Reuben, the gate of Judah, and the gate of Levi, the gates of the city being named after the tribes of Israel.
zh: 城門要按以色列各支派取名。北面有三個門口，一個是流本門，一個是猶大門，一個是利未門。

en: On the east side, which is to be 4,500 cubits, three gates, the gate of Joseph, the gate of Benjamin, and the gate of Dan.
zh: 東面的長度是二千二百五十公尺，有三個門口，一個是約瑟門，一個是便雅憫門，一個是但門。

en: On the south side, which is to be 4,500 cubits by measure, three gates, the gate of Simeon, the gate of Issachar, and the gate of Zebulun.
zh: 南面的長度是二千二百五十公尺，有三個門口，一個是西緬門，一個是以薩迦門，一個是西布倫門。

en: On the west side, which is to be 4,500 cubits, three gates, the gate of Gad, the gate of Asher, and the gate of Naphtali.
zh: 西面的長度是二千二百五十公尺，也有三個門口，一個是迦得門，一個是亞設門，一個是拿弗他利門。

en: The circumference of the city shall be 18,000 cubits. And the name of the city from that time on shall be, The LORD is there."
zh: 城的周圍共長九千公尺。從此以後，這城的名字要稱為‘耶和華的所在’。”
